unauthorizedDatasourceInstances.description: Datasource instances that require per-user OAuth authorization. Empty when all datasources are authorized.

items.description: A datasource instance that could not return results for this request because the user has not completed or has expired per-user OAuth.

datasourceInstance.description: The instance identifier (e.g. "github", "github_enterprise_0", "slack_0"). Matches the instance names used in datasource configuration.

displayName.description: Human-readable name of the datasource instance for display.

authStatus.description: The per-user authorization status for a datasource.
authStatus.title: AuthStatus

authUrlRelativePath.description: Relative path to initiate or resume OAuth for the current user and instance, including a one-time authentication token as a query parameter. Clients should prepend their configured Glean backend base URL.

items.title: UnauthorizedDatasourceInstance
